data.label: Benefic
data.description: Classical nature associated with support, facilitation, growth or harmonization.

data.label: Malefic
data.description: Classical nature associated with tension, constraint, friction or challenge.

data.label: Variable
data.description: Nature whose expression depends strongly on context, associations and surrounding conditions.

data.label: Luminary
data.description: Symbolic role reserved for the Sun and Moon as the two primary lights of the chart.

data.label: Neutral
data.description: Neutral or descriptive nature without a default benefic or malefic classification.

data.label: Transpersonal
data.description: Modern astrological family for slow collective objects whose symbolism extends beyond personal expression.
